name: pothole-live-view
description: Local plugin manifest for the pothole live detection feed.

interface.shortDescription: View the live pothole detection feed and metadata.
interface.longDescription: Uses the local Flask server to expose recent pothole detections, model confidence, saved thumbnails, and location metadata.
defaultPrompt: Show the latest pothole detections from the local feed.
Open the live JSON feed for the pothole dashboard.
Summarize detection confidence and live location metadata.
